message:
test(fwc): expand export_tools, identifier, and format_table test suites

export_tools: 67 → 135 tests (+68) — ToolSchemaFormat traits, ExportOptions,
McpToolAnnotations, ClaudeTool/OpenAiTool, description building, risk/
capability filters, make_tool_name, export_operation_infos, cross-format
consistency, serialization roundtrips.

identifier: 67 → 123 tests (+56) — LookupRequest edge cases, MatchQuality
ordering, ResourceCandidate, resolve_candidates ambiguity/propagation,
LookupOutcome roundtrips, DisambiguationPrompt, ConnectorResourceModel,
RESOURCE_FAMILIES membership, find_resource_family, suggest_discovery_commands.

format_table: 68 → 118 tests (+50) — TabularFormat/Options traits,
resolve_path/format_cell edge cases, escape_delimited/markdown,
integration combos, limit boundaries, Unicode/CJK, single column,
wrapper objects, TSV specifics, auto_detect_columns, extract_cell_values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
